description: Legal fragment in Hebrew. Some unusual formulae, and unusual hand. Late? T-S AS 206.304 and T-S AS 206.304 seem to be two different legal documents by the same scribe (both contain the phrase שלם ונפש חפצה, which reduces the likelihood that they come from the same document).
description_he: מסמך משפטי בעברית. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
